title: Timefall Coin
description: This mod adds the Timefall Coin and Timefall Coin Pile, used in the TSMP, but is a base that can be changed to fit a Modpack's Theme
body:
This mod simply adds a coin item that can be found in any chest that is added, modded or otherwise. This mod is also being provided for anyone to be able to make a themed coin for their server (or pack, or whatever, really). All you'd need to do is change the texture file with a resource pack or by editing the JAR.

The Timefall Coin can be found in any chest, even those added by different mods. They can also be combined into a space saving item that stores four (4) coins per item. They can also be found in the Functional Creative Menu Tab.

The code was provided by [fzzyhmstrs](https://modrinth.com/user/fzzyhmstrs) and the textures were provided by [purejoshmc](https://modrinth.com/user/purejosh).

This project is given to the Public Domain.
